name: Morphous Peacock
description: A shadcn/tweakcn-compatible ornate portfolio system to be coded from the Peacock light and dark design-system boards: teal garden surfaces, cobalt navigation, emerald success, bronze depth, and gold focus. The light and dark design-system boards are the reference for coding any future theme.
typography: Geist for refined product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for multilingual headings, labels, and numeric rhythm.
layout: Precise 8px grids, feather-eye medallion accents, ornamental dividers, portfolio cards, and dense editorial surfaces.
